name: DC Universe RPG
description:
DC Universe RPG
(With my big ass Lorebook)

Immerse yourself in the vast DC universe, experience major events in the history of various heroes and villains, from intergalactic threats to multiverse crises. Or simply create your own story with your original character, teaming up with iconic comic book heroes or working side by side with the most notorious villains.

-----
Update: added more information about the world in the bot and removed a negative line from the prompt.
164 characters from (almost) ALL the DC Universe franchises.
-----
Yes, it’s my first RPG.
Yes, I only tried the introductions.
Yes, it probably doesn’t work properly.


Lorebook Info: 210 Entries = 100K+ Tokens Total

Have fun and let me know if it works decently or if it’s Abysmal Dogshit.
creator: WnMinoru
